# PlateUp Tool — Examples

## Turkey — Tier 5, OT9

A complete Turkey restaurant layout at Tier 5 with 9 Overtime stars. Modded run although primarily just for the custom layout (plus end of day clean up, and mod to turn research desks)

[Open in Planner](https://eddy0612.github.io/PlateUpTool/#_gASq0EtlBMjKQAmo8JyPiAVlAGGlBkeAZXhEA0MWQBpFkgDUHJAGsayANqgD0jw91tQAfEzEFACRfAkkiJNIxASiREqXZAJYuyAS5dkAmC7IBNxiQCxKkgFk45ALN4yAWjxkAta1IEgC2hsQFvWogkAXZFSALwmrAF6VBgu-BDDe0CGRFIQMl4yAZSakCQBlpmQLAGY8ZAM2MxAZ07iCAFpJkaaZGqyYENdkwIbLJgQ2hDIBtiGQDcEMgG6IZAN9NQhQA4CLCFADkKkQHKRYgsAdMpHUVx2DGBKAHcMYEoAeAxgSgB7kWEKAHwmYQsAfLehA-ybEFAD8JsQUAQ4iwhQBD0zCFgEQGsIIkmYgROtxAjA7wBGUzgEgEaEOAWAR8YwIkYhhCQCSRmELAJKVIQSYmwhIBJ0zCFgEoAUIJS3ogSpxxBIBNCJAiajGBE2IkCJuMYETgiQInQhgiQCdxmCLAJ4kYIT2MwRYBPobBCfk2CJAKBW4IsAoKLghSxjAlAFMIkCKcRIEU8YwJQBVSLBCrE2CJAKvW4IsArACgiQAzsZmMvGVjJxkqLtFuizRXoq0U6CU9KclNSmJS0pSUlKQlHSjN53sA)
